title: UK GOV MIL WINDRM51
short description: UK GOV/MIL "WinDRM51" variant. Unknown purpose, But link between UK & Cyprus has been found some years ago.
description:
UK GOV/MIL "WinDRM51" variant, supposed to be idle only, seen on many frequencies in the past, for an unknown purpose yet. But the link between the UK & Cyprus was found some years ago. Credit: Linkz -- [Cartoonman](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/User%3ACartoonman) ( [talk](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/User_talk%3ACartoonman)) 08:59, 18 January 2016 (NZDT)

It is a special case of OFDM that uses only one of every two symbols.
